name: night-city-net
description: Найт-Сити Нет — мессенджер в стиле Cyberpunk 2077

scripts.verify: node scripts/apply-auth-fix.mjs && node scripts/verify-project.mjs && node --check worker.js && python3 -m py_compile setup_calls.py setup_icons.py
scripts.test:rules: npx --yes firebase-tools@15.23.0 emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-night-city "node --test test/firestore.rules.test.mjs"
scripts.android:sync: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync android && npm run android:configure
scripts.android:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
